message:
feat(search,analytics,lib,ui): major search query expansion, analytics validation improvements, storage and UI refinements

Search query (~429 lines changed):
- Major expansion of search query pipeline with improved progressive
  search integration, result scoring, and phase coordination

Analytics validation (~124 lines):
- Expand validation with additional metric boundary checks and
  structured error classification

Core lib (~173 lines):
- Expand health check, export, and session management paths

Storage:
- Add additional SQLite query methods

UI:
- App state management expansion with additional view transitions
- Analytics chart minor adjustment
- CLI dispatch test expansion

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1633,6 +1633,26 @@ fn analytics_validate_reports_query_failure_for_malformed_schema() {
             .unwrap()
             .contains("Track A invariant query failed")
     );
+    assert_eq!(json["data"]["perf"]["timeseries"]["within_budget"], false);
+    assert!(
+        json["data"]["perf"]["timeseries"]["error"]
+            .as_str()
+            .unwrap()
+            .contains("no such column")
+    );
+    assert!(
+        json["data"]["perf"]["timeseries"]["details"]
+            .as_str()
+            .unwrap()
+            .contains("failed")
+    );
+    assert_eq!(json["data"]["perf"]["breakdown"]["within_budget"], false);
+    assert!(
+        json["data"]["perf"]["breakdown"]["error"]
+            .as_str()
+            .unwrap()
+            .contains("no such column")
+    );
     assert!(
         json["data"]["summary"]["errors"].as_u64().unwrap_or(0) >= 1,
         "malformed analytics schema should surface at least one error"
